card_description: Brasmus is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick proposes a "Light Body" theory of immortality: a 2,000-year-old collective "Bioplasmic" entity (the fellowship of Christ) re-enters human hosts through the 3rd eye/pineal gland."
